company_id: # stripping the leading period prefix like "2020Q1_") to the XBRL member for that
# filer. Needed for BUSINESS SEGMENTS and for geographic regions not covered by
# US (EDGAR): `member` is the EXACT member local-name in the filing
label: e.g. Qorvo:

company_id: # Japan (EDINET): `member` is any SUBSTRING of the reportable-segment / geographic
# member local-name that appears in the report's context ids
label: e.g. Sony

company_id: # Korea (OpenDART notes): geographic revenue matches by region name automatically
# (no mapping needed; country- and continent-level names are recognised). Add a
# geo row only to alias an unusual region label
label: e.g. 103

company_id: # BUSINESS segments: `member` is the 부문 name used in the reportable-segment
# Taiwan: segment/geo is footnote-only (MOPS TIFRS PDF) and not in any free API
